title: CBC: Locometal Armor
description: A Create: Steam 'n' Rails addon created by MinWix Mods team that adds armor properties to locometal blocks
body:
The mod adds **armor properties** to the **locometal** from the Steam and Rails mod for working with Create: Big Canons.
# Changes:
- **Block toughness was changed to 25.0 and hardness to 2.0**, now buildings made of locometal resist projectiles much better.
- The **spark effect** has been added to locometal blocks

**Blast resistance doesn't changed!**

P.S. If you are going to use this mod in the video - please tag @MinWix_Mods_Team in the description
